annotations.query: Neymar (Barcelona) attempts to find one of his teammates with a sweet pass into the box, but one of the defending players reacts well and intercepts the effort.
annotations.short-term: Neymar attempts to find one of his teammates with a sweet pass into the box, but it is blocked by a well-positioned defender. The defensive effort prevented a dangerous situation in the penalty area.
annotations.label: chance
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) attempts to find one of his teammates with a sweet pass into the box, but one of the defending players reacts well and intercepts the effort.

annotations.query: Javier Pastore (Paris SG) plays a through ball but overhits it.

annotations.label: other
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) plays a through ball but overhits it.

annotations.query: Lionel Messi (Barcelona) nearly creates a chance, but his attempt to pick out a teammate with a through ball does not come off.

annotations.query: Luis Suarez (Barcelona) makes a great solo run and pulls the trigger from inside the box, beating Salvatore Sirigu with a strike into the right side of the goal. He makes it 0:2.
annotations.short-term: Luis Suarez makes a great solo run, weaving through the defense. He takes on a defender and beats him before pulling the trigger from inside the box, sending a powerful strike into the right side of the goal, leaving the goalkeeper helpless. That makes it 0:2, a brilliant individual effort.
annotations.label: goal
annotations.query_ano: [PLAYER] ([TEAM]) makes a great solo run and pulls the trigger from inside the box, beating Salvatore Sirigu with a strike into the right side of the goal. He makes it 0:2.
